description_long: This jewelry object consists of three ornate, gold-toned floral brooches or pins arranged vertically on a neutral display stand. Each brooch features intricate petal detailing, with a layered, dimensional structure that mimics the appearance of a blooming flower. The petals are rendered in a warm, metallic gold color, and the centers of the flowers are slightly raised, adding depth and realism. The display stand is a smooth, matte gray form, shaped to resemble a human neck and upper chest, providing a neutral backdrop that highlights the jewelry's details. The back and sides of the stand are plain, with the jewelry only visible from the front and slightly from the sides. The overall presentation suggests a focus on the decorative, floral motif of the jewelry pieces.
description: A set of three gold-toned, intricately detailed floral brooches displayed vertically on a matte gray neck stand. The brooches feature layered petals and a realistic, blooming flower design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three gold floral brooches arranged vertically on the gray display stand.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the profile of the stand and the slight protrusion of the brooches from the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the display stand with no jewelry visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the stand and the edge of the brooches.
